name: @absolutejs/cli
description: Substrate CLI for the AbsoluteJS PaaS — secrets / env / deploy verbs over @absolutejs/secrets, @absolutejs/deploy, and @absolutejs/audit. Config-file driven; sibling to @absolutejs/absolute (the framework CLI).
author: Alex Kahn

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build src/index.ts src/cli.ts --outdir dist --root src --sourcemap --target=bun && tsc --project tsconfig.build.json
scripts.check:package: bun run typecheck && bun run build && bun run test
scripts.release: bun run format && bun run check:package && bun publish
